metadata.description: 8 MCP servers: web search, memory, Notion, email, Telegram, Godot, code review, image/video understanding + generation

plugins.name: wet-mcp
plugins.description: Web search, content extraction, library docs & media — 5-strategy scraping, no API keys

plugins.name: better-notion-mcp
plugins.description: Markdown-first Notion for AI agents — pages, databases, blocks & comments in one call

plugins.name: better-godot-mcp
plugins.description: Godot Engine — 17 composite tools for game development

plugins.name: better-telegram-mcp
plugins.description: Telegram dual-mode (Bot API + MTProto) — messages, chats, media, contacts

plugins.name: better-code-review-graph
plugins.description: Knowledge graph for token-efficient code reviews

plugins.name: imagine-mcp
plugins.description: Image/video understanding + generation across Gemini, OpenAI, Grok
